description: A piece of equipment that was in radioactive service needs to be decontaminated before it can be sent for repair.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the decontamination procedure for the specific asset.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the approved procedure for cleaning the equipment.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the decontamination, ensuring the assigned personnel have the required radiation safety training.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the work order and verifies the qualifications of the assigned crew.

nodes.task_description: After cleaning, perform a radiation survey to confirm the asset is clean, and document the results before releasing it for repair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the successful radiation survey results, clearing the equipment for general maintenance.
